2026-0695
2026-07-07INFCBuild Canada Homes ActOrder Fixing the Day on Which This Order is Made as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Build Canada Homes Act Come into ForceOrder fixing the day on which this Order is made as the day on which sections 1 to 28, 30 to 40, 42 to 46, 48 and 49 of that Act come into force in order to establish Build Canada Homes as a Crown corporation.N/A
subject: Order Fixing the Day on Which This Order is Made as the Day on Which Certain Provisions of the Build Canada Homes Act Come into Force
precis: Order fixing the day on which this Order is made as the day on which sections 1 to 28, 30 to 40, 42 to 46, 48 and 49 of that Act come into force in order to establish Build Canada Homes as a Crown corporation.
